S1 E29 The consequences of Adanna and Nnanna's love come to rest at their door. Mkpulumma and Ahunna are running out of time, and Onochie steps up in the midst of chaos.
S1 E30 Adanna and Nnanna face a crisis, Ejike fights to prove himself worthy.
S2 E8 Urenna targets Nwoye's intended, Adanna for friendship. Ijeawele's heart is torn between her past and her present.
Despite Uncle Godfrey's advice to baby Kanife, his nephew's wife, she decides to be stubborn despite her pregnancy, decision that might ruin something.
Alhaji falls in love with his daughter's friend Catherine, but this soon turns out to be sour as Alhaji dies after getting Catharine pregnant and Zainab blames her.
Amaka is prepared to marry Kelly, but when Kelly comes back from abroad, he falls in love with Nkechi. Will Amaka let it go?
Days before a Doctor's wedding ceremony, his wife says she is no longer interested. Little did he know that the man she calls her brother is the man she is in love with.
Born of the river's power, Nwando loves a mortal, Chidi, only to be betrayed with her sister, Nneka. Enraged, she awakens the waters and unleashes a storm.
Chinedu takes his devoted wife Chioma for granted while his friend Nnamdi finds comfort in the arms of his ex-fiancée's mother. As betrayal and forbidden desire unfolds.
Blinded by a dangerous obsession, Stan is on the verge of committing an unforgivable act. A twisted desire to marry Mira, his brother's wife, for whom he harbors an all-consuming love.
Blinded by a dangerous obsession, Stan is on the verge of committing an unforgivable act. A twisted desire to marry Mira, his brother's wife, for whom he harbors an all-consuming love.
After Urenna is murdered and her lover killed unjustly, her spirit hunts the entire kingdom and kills everyone in sight.
Paulinus and Olivia, domestic spies hired by a couple to monitor each other unexpectedly fall in love. Together, they endeavor to rekindle the couple's love.
Lanre tolerated Clara's excesses for years because of their loving daughter, but everything soon crumbles as she meets Jason who eventually ruins her life.

programmes.t: Road Block Diaries, One Must Die
programmes.d: Road Block Diaries, One Must Die.
A young man takes it upon himself to hunt down the thieves who have stolen cows from his family's farm and community.
A king announces that his daughter, the princess, will take over as the next monarch. This sets off a chain of events marred by jealousy, betrayal and violence.
A orphaned princess is heir to the throne, but her evil stepmother takes control of it. The princess escapes death and is forced into exile but tries to win back her inheritance.
A serious medical condition forces a pregnant woman to make a heart-breaking decision.
The son of a billionaire and his PA trade places when visiting a village. The PA is immediately treated like royalty while the actual billionaire's son lives happily under the radar.
A graduate sees an opportunity to open an ABET school in the village, but her idea is challenged when she gets the most thick-headed adults as her students.
A workaholic's friends take her on a birthday getaway where she meets the love of her life, but will her past heartbreak allow her to believe in love again?
A dutiful wife must navigate the stigma of divorce when she finally leaves her husband after years of emotional torment.
A talented comedian dreams of telling jokes and having her own TV show. With a friend's help, she overcomes hurdles, betrayal and her fear of performing for an audience.
An honest and dedicated mama's boy finds his morals and values compromised when his mother puts pressure on him to take a wife and settle down.
A ten year old girl arrives at the Mbonani household. No one knows where she came from, but she knows and resembles the Mbonanis.
A wounded Zulu warrior finds refuge in a neighbouring village after losing his wife and child tragically. His revenge mission is then compromised.
Two villages are separated by a river, which holds the life to both communities. The villages don't see eye to eye, and no one is willing to swallow their pride.
S1 E8 Naledi relies on the roomies to help her deal with a terrible date. Abza offers to babysit when Themba struggles to find a babysitter.
S1 E9 Naledi's food truck faces an uncertain future when Abza's mom shuts down her ideas for the business. MaNkoli pays Tsholo a surprise visit and makes a demand that leaves her shocked.
S1 E10 Abza struggles to keep the secret about his failing business venture from his mother. Ntsika makes an unexpected new hire at the barbershop.
S1 E11 Naledi is not pleased with Ntsika's friendship with Lumka. Themba struggles to balance fatherhood and Bonolo's demands.
After Khanyi's fiancé cheats on her, she becomes a closed off workaholic. Things change when her mother unexpectedly moves in with her and tries to get her back in the game.
After Khanyi's fiancé cheats on her, she becomes a closed off workaholic. Things change when her mother unexpectedly moves in with her and tries to get her back in the game.
A hopeless romantic man questions his romantic relationship when an old friend asks him to be his best man. He now wants to confess his feelings to his friend.
A touching movie about friendship and sacrifice. A group of friends come together to care for their terminally ill friend, who has been kept hidden by her cruel grandmother.
When his wife struggles to fall pregnant, a frustrated husband decides to impregnate his maid.
After the death of her father, a young girl finds herself at the mercy of her cruel stepmother and stepsister, who reduce her to an ordinary labourer.
A cynical tokoloshe slayer is ready to retire, but then he discovers he can only remove the curse by transferring it to an unsuspecting victim.
Starring songstress Mara Louw, this drama about jealousy, greed and murder sees five wives of a wealthy taxi boss in the middle of a bloody battle for his riches.
A young man just found himself a girlfriend. Just when he thinks life is about to be cozy for him, he encounters the angry spirit of a dead man who was transported home for a burial.
After beating up and arresting an undercover police officer, Thabang is dismissed from his job as a detective. He is then forced to take a job at a security company.
A wave of cash-in-transit heists has hit the city, and only one security company left can end these robberies: Mabena Security.
A runaway bride is helped by strangers in a tavern to come to terms with her feelings about her wedding and her husband-to-be.
Two elderly ladies get thrown out of a stokvel they started years ago. They are determined to take their revenge, despite old age posing a challenge.
With his partner, con man Zakes recruits a young boy into their crime syndicate. Soon, Zakes realises that he needs to reform after almost losing the boy.
After losing his late mother's trust fund to a fraudster, a naive musician gets an opportunity of a lifetime when he signs a recording deal.
On the outside, Thato looks like he has his life together. However, the truth is that he's drowning in debt.
A title holding championship boxer gets into a car accident and loses his ability to do any sports. He finds a way to heal, save his gym and inspire others from his wheelchair.
A smart and obedient girl dreams of studying engineering. Her dream is cut short when her family offers her as a wife to culturally reunite two families.
Thabo used to live lavishly and after seven years of unemployment, he gets a job. However, his employer has an ulterior motive.
A brother turns his brother into a beastly creature so he can get to rule over his father's kingdom. Only pure love can remove the hideous spell over him.
A couple move into a house where the daughter of the original owners died moments before her birthday. Things start to happen in the house, causing a rift between the couple.
When Ntombikayise loses her husband, she discovers that he has a whole other life that he and his family have kept hidden from her for years.
Tumelo and his wife are a far cry from the affectionate and happy couple they used to be. After many years together, they can hardly stand being in the same room.
A princess is caught between following her heart and putting her family's interests before love. She embarks on a voyage of self-discovery.
A man wants to keep a promise to his son. When he meets a woman who could make this possible, he's thrilled. Then, she reveals what she wants in return.
A man wants to keep a promise to his son. When he meets a woman who could make this possible, he's thrilled. Then, she reveals what she wants in return.
When a new B&B opens right next to his own place, a man is envious as everyone seems to like the new one better. He devises a plan to get the secret recipe.
This movie tackles cyber bullying in South Africa. A group of high school girls face the social humiliation of cyber bullying. They have to find ways to combat it.
In a case of good versus evil, a troubled taxi driver finds himself walking on the dark side due to financial constraints and pressures to make ends meet at home.
A hilarious comedy about a sports-obsessed man who decides he's had enough of his wife's nagging and wants her to disappear.
A man wants to keep a promise to his son. When he meets a woman who could make this possible, he's thrilled. Then, she reveals what she wants in return.
Masego plays the lottery as an act of defiance against her husband who despises gambling. Masego is overcome with both fear and hope when against all odds, she wins the lottery.
Things are looking up for Lesedi. He has a new job and is beginning to live the life he's always wanted. There's only one problem: his girlfriend is too far from him.
Noni and her father, Madzara, bond through their shared passion for dance. They attempt to secure a dance scholarship by making a short dance film.
After being betrayed by one of her closest friends, a dance superstar rediscovers her passion and what's truly important in life by saving an orphanage.
Zakhona and her husband, Bongani, are happily married with two daughters. Life couldn't be more perfect until Bongani brings home a second wife who is expecting his son.
A spoiled mama's boy has his relationship with his mother put to the test when he starts dating. Who will remain standing by his side: his mother or his new love?
A teenager's life is thrown off balance when she discovers the parents that raised her as their own are actually not her biological parents.
A young couple is about to walk down the aisle. On the morning of the wedding, skeletons from their pasts threaten to keep them apart.
A rebellious city girl is sent by her mother to a rural township to stay with her father. Through their mutual love of poetry, the estranged duo learns to connect.
When Wanele wears a dead woman's dreadlocks, the owner of the dreadlocks starts haunting her for stealing her man.
Long-standing tensions arise when a father dies just before Christmas, leaving his fortune to his nephew instead of his son and siblings.
Nonhle Jones finds love in the arms of her best friend's ex-lover. She finds herself in a race against time to confess and save her friendship and business.
When the boy Sentebaleng has a crush on kicks her out after a night together, she gets into a car accident and starts haunting him.
A orphaned princess is heir to the throne, but her evil stepmother takes control of it. The princess escapes death and is forced into exile but tries to win back her inheritance.
Gang leader, Mbukeni Zulu, finds himself falling in love with his mentor's arch enemy's daughter. He must now choose between the gang and his new love.
A paranormal drama about Sima, a professional stick fighter who also possesses powers that can raise or kill her bloodline.
After Khanyi's fiancé cheats on her, she becomes a closed off workaholic. Things change when her mother unexpectedly moves in with her and tries to get her back in the game.
Two half-brothers are fighting over their late father's house. How far will they go to get what they want?
A handsome struggling actor opens an agency that seems to attract young, hot girls. His wife becomes jealous and decides to set a trap for him to see if he is faithful.
A cheese-girl goes to visit her strict grandfather during school holidays. Their relationship is shaky at first, but here she finally discovers the true meaning of family.
When her daughter goes missing, a woman's faith in all that is good is put to the test as a dubious detective centres his investigation around her husband.
A young guy meets the girl of his dreams and plans grand romantic gestures that never quite work. The situation is made worse by the fact that she doesn't notice him.
Two half-brothers are fighting over their late father's house. How far will they go to get what they want?
This is Vuyo and Bheki's last New Year's Eve together, before Bheki emigrates to the UK. They decide to make it an epic night to remember.
Kortes, a young woman living with dwarfism, is happy with her boyfriend, Themba. This all changes when he introduces her to his family, who disapprove of their relationship.

SpongeBob works the grill at the toughest joint in town.

Lola and Mr. Grouse find a diamond hiding in the yard.

Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play.

S10 E11 Hoogtepunte van visvang in die Suid Kaap, tropiese vrugte in die Laeveld en 'n Madagaskar avontuur! Ons kom dan terug na Jan se braai kombuis in sy eie huis.
S10 E11 Hoogtepunte van visvang in die Suid Kaap, tropiese vrugte in die Laeveld en 'n Madagaskar avontuur! Ons kom dan terug na Jan se braai kombuis in sy eie huis.
S3 E13 André kuier op die pragtige plek, Isabis. Joachim Cranz wys hoe hy met sy passie vir sterre 'boer'. Eksklusiewe 4x4 roetes kan hier uit jou kajuit ervaar word, maar bespreking is noodsaaklik.
S25 E10 Ons kuier saam met Lindie Strydom en haar seun, dan by robredders, akteur en kunstenaar Francois Coertze, voël-fundie Ben Smit en op die Noord-Kaap finalisdorp vir Kwêla Dorp van die Jaar.
S2 E8 Hierdie week gesels ons oor eetgewoontes en vra of die klas weet waar rosyntjies vandaan kom. Ons vra ook of hulle dink dis lekker om 'n grootmens te wees.
S1 E2 Musiekvideo's vir elke smaak.
S3 E2 Ons ry deur die Oos-Vrystaat, verken 'n paar plekke sowel as 'n mooi wandelroete. In Namibia 'glamp' ons teen die Chobe riviere en reis deur die Moordenaars Karoo op soek na wilde kamp plekke.
S3 E10 Ferdie se veldtog vorder fantasties tot 'n gebeurtenis uit Ferdie se verlede die appelkar omgooi. Thomas se broer kom kuier en vat 'n kans met Jony, terwyl Jaap oorweeg of hy moet aanbeweeg.
S3 E9 Hannes klop aan by een van die grootste pioniers en media-indoenas, Naspers se Ton Vosloo.
S12 E51 Inspirasie vir jou Lewensreis vanuit Mosaïek gemeente. 'Vir wie soek julle?' Jesus se vraag in Joh 18 is 'n uitnodiging na 'n duidelike visie van God. Saam met Jacques Bornman.
S10 E21 Martin behandel belangrike graad 8 en 9 wiskunde konsepte.
S10 E22 In wiskunde behandel Martin graad 10 wiskunde konsepte. Werner kyk, tydens die FW deel van die les, na die fisiese wetenskappe konsepte wat in graad 10 bemeester moet word.
S10 E23 In wiskunde behandel Martin graad 11 wiskunde konsepte. Werner kyk, tydens die FW deel van die les, na die fisiese wetenskappe konsepte wat in graad 11 bemeester moet word.
S10 E24 Martin behandel graad 12 wiskunde konsepte.
S10 E25 Werner behandel graad 12 fisiese wetenskappe konsepte.
S1 E151 Jannie Moolman kuier by Villa Rosa. Fritz is bekommerd dat Charl sy dividende van die diamantboot gaan uitmors. Dewald maak hom tuis en maak soveel informasie bymekaar as wat hy kan.
S1 E152 Die Kerstyd laat Charl opnuut na Wanda verlang. Natasha daag by Villa Rosa op, en sy en Ben sit lelik vas. Jannie Moolman weier steeds om te sê wie sy geheime gas is.
S1 E153 Dis Villa Rosa se tweede Kersfees en die keer is almal daar, behalwe Rebecca, op haar geheimsinnige vakansie. Jannie Moolman se geheime eregas maak sy opwagting.
S1 E154 Dis vir die inwoners 'n opdraande stryd om by die diensrooster te hou tydens Rebecca se afwesigheid. Charl soek 'n egskeiding, en Ben kom vorendag met skokkende nuus.
S1 E155 Ben wil hê almal in Villa Rosa moet 'n leuenverklikkertoets aflê om uit te vind wie die Kersete se kontant gevat het, en dan laat Fritz 'n bom val.
S1 E151 Chrissie sukkel om haar emosies oor Lorette te verwerk. Die afrigters bespreek die naweek se wedstryd en besluit Reitz en Blitz het meer ondersteuning nodig. Maryke deel opwindende nuus.
S1 E152 Sasha moet 'n moeilike besluit neem oor haar vriendskap met Renate. Festus het 'n ernstige gesprek met Pottie. Lorette beleef 'n terugslag. Maryke deel belangrike nuus met die pompoms.
S1 E153 Chrissie en Gideon is verstom oor Nina se verskuilde talente. Renate het 'n blink idee rakende Virginia. Festus en Koekie deel 'n romantiese oomblik. Die Stryders verras vir Maryke.
S1 E154 Iva stel voor dat al die Bekkers traumaberading ondergaan. Renate is oorstelp van vreugde. 'n Gefrustreerde Jade is moedeloos met haar werk. Ruan en Chrissie geniet mekaar se geselskap.
S1 E155 Virginia trek in haar nuwe huis in. Reitz weet nie hoe om die situasie met Lorette te hanteer nie. Daar is uiteindelik weer vreugde in die Cloete-huishouding.
S2 E8 Hierdie week gesels ons oor eetgewoontes en vra of die klas weet waar rosyntjies vandaan kom. Ons vra ook of hulle dink dis lekker om 'n grootmens te wees.

programmes.t: Bewonder & Bewaar Met Bonné De Bod
programmes.d: S1 E8 Guanacos het Darwin so betower dat Bonné die pad na Patagonië vat om uit te vind hoekom. Sy sluit by navorser Emanuel Galetto aan wat 'n nekband aan een wil sit, maar die taak is moeilik!
S1 E48 'n Gesondheidsprogram met 'n holistiese benadering tot algehele welstand van liggaam, siel en gees, aangebied deur Suzaan Steyn.
S1 E12 Marie het 'n dringende saak om met Werner te bespreek. Tiaart is die ene senuwees voor sy eerste afspraak met sy droommeisie. Die slinkse Veronica bewerk Dotty se ondergang.
S16 E343 Daaglikse nuushooftrekke, sporthoogtepunte en weervooruitskouing in Afrikaans.
S3 E10 Hannes diep stories op en kuier heerlik in Oudtshoorn by die geliefde akteurs-egpaar, Johan en Lida Botha.

S2 E25 Bianca le Grange deel haar en haar man se stryd om swanger te raak. Vrugbaarheidsberader Natalie Solomon gee raad en vertel van háár moeilike reis. Bianca bederf ons ook met haar fantastiese sang.
Moeksie en Patrysie is 'n ma-en-dogter-vertoning om te aanskou. Maar Patrysie hunker na meer as net hierdie brandewyngrappies om die braaivleisvuur.
S1 E13 Na al die 'opwinding' van die vorige episode lê twee huwelike aan skerwe. Karima se baba word vroeg gebore. Daniël maak uiteindelik 'n keuse oor sy toekoms.
S4 E9 Jak kuier oor 'n koppie tee met die bekende Afrikaanse kletsrymer Jan Bloukaas, wat openhartig vertel van sy kanker stryd.
S3 E10 Ferdie se veldtog vorder fantasties tot 'n gebeurtenis uit Ferdie se verlede die appelkar omgooi. Thomas se broer kom kuier en vat 'n kans met Jony, terwyl Jaap oorweeg of hy moet aanbeweeg.
S1 E12 Marie het 'n dringende saak om met Werner te bespreek. Tiaart is die ene senuwees voor sy eerste afspraak met sy droommeisie. Die slinkse Veronica bewerk Dotty se ondergang.
S13 E14 Ons klop aan by Amy Kleinhans-Curd en gesels oor Die Real Housewives van die Wynlande. Corlea Botha gesels oor haar 10 jaar as solo-sangeres, en ons ontmoet nuweling sangeres, Deidre Barnard.

programmes.t: Bewonder & Bewaar Met Bonné De Bod
programmes.d: S1 E8 Guanacos het Darwin so betower dat Bonné die pad na Patagonië vat om uit te vind hoekom. Sy sluit by navorser Emanuel Galetto aan wat 'n nekband aan een wil sit, maar die taak is moeilik!
S3 E9 Anzél kuier saam rugbyspeler CJ Stander op Val de Vie. Sy vat ook die pad na die Hemel & Aarde vallei en besoek Hamilton Russel en ontmoet Berene Sauls van Tesselaarsdal.

S2 E25 Bianca le Grange deel haar en haar man se stryd om swanger te raak. Vrugbaarheidsberader Natalie Solomon gee raad en vertel van háár moeilike reis. Bianca bederf ons ook met haar fantastiese sang.
S1 E2 Musiekvideo's vir elke smaak.
S6 E293 Inspirasie vir jou lewensreis vanuit Mosaïek gemeente. Ontvang Sy genade. Saam met Rowland Jones.
S1 E21 Zim Zim is 'n sesjarige seuntjie, maar hy krimp elke keer as hy 'n fout maak. As hy so klein is word hy geneem na 'n geheime plek waar hy 'n superheld kan wees.
S13 E16 Ons kuier by die Wessels broers, Robbie en Hamilton. Sanger Ruhan du Toit gesels oor sy drie dekades in die musiekbedryf. Ons ontmoet die veelsydige aktrise en sangeres, Augusta Zietsman.
S1 E155 Ben wil hê almal in Villa Rosa moet 'n leuenverklikkertoets aflê om uit te vind wie die Kersete se kontant gevat het, en dan laat Fritz 'n bom val.
S1 E155 Virginia trek in haar nuwe huis in. Reitz weet nie hoe om die situasie met Lorette te hanteer nie. Daar is uiteindelik weer vreugde in die Cloete-huishouding.
S25 E10 Ons kuier saam met Lindie Strydom en haar seun, dan by robredders, akteur en kunstenaar Francois Coertze, voël-fundie Ben Smit en op die Noord-Kaap finalisdorp vir Kwêla Dorp van die Jaar.
S6 E143 Lee-Roy vertel Devon die waarheid oor Anna se swangerskap. Beatrice besluit om vir Rachel te besoek. Hein is ontsteld wanneer Cornelius belangstelling in Yvette toon.
S10 E194 Annetjie se sagte plekkie vir At Koster gaan nie ongesiens verby nie, en Naomi sit haar voet neer wanneer dit by die huissoekery kom.
S9 E155 Dis chaos by JPD wanneer Nazeem se geheime plan in werking kom. Lee-Ann probeer vrede maak met Ty, terwyl 'n inbeller na Radio Dassie vir Susan die skrik op die lyf jaag.
S4 E9 Jak kuier oor 'n koppie tee met die bekende Afrikaanse kletsrymer Jan Bloukaas, wat openhartig vertel van sy kanker stryd.
